description: Synthetic credential-free regression fixtures for deterministic marked-memory extraction and exact evidence contracts; not real-model or pilot quality evidence.

sources.title: English marked memories
sources.content:
# English architecture note

Decision: Use SQLite for local metadata
Reason: It avoids another required service.
Status: accepted

Assumption: A single writer owns the local database.

Constraint: Source content must remain on the local machine.

Alternative: Use PostgreSQL for a hosted team deployment.
Status: rejected

expected_memories.evidence_quote:
Decision: Use SQLite for local metadata
Reason: It avoids another required service.
Status: accepted

expected_memories.evidence_quote:
Alternative: Use PostgreSQL for a hosted team deployment.
Status: rejected

sources.title: Vietnamese marked memories
sources.content:
# Ghi chú kiến trúc

Quyết định: Dùng SQLite cho dữ liệu cục bộ
Lý do: Không cần thêm dịch vụ ngoài.
Trạng thái: accepted

Giả định: Chỉ có một tiến trình ghi dữ liệu.

Ràng buộc: Dữ liệu không được rời khỏi máy.

Phương án: Dùng PostgreSQL khi triển khai cho nhóm.

sources.title: CJK statements with supported markers
sources.content:
# 本地架构

Decision: 使用 SQLite 保存本地元数据
Reason: 不需要额外服务。

Constraint: 源数据不得离开本机。

expected_memories.statement: 使用 SQLite 保存本地元数据
expected_memories.evidence_quote:

Reason: 不需要额外服务。
Constraint: 源数据不得离开本机。

sources.title: Supported heading markers
sources.content:
## Decision: Prefer local files

## Alternative: Use object storage later
Reason: Hosted scale has not been measured.
Status: obsolete

expected_memories.evidence_quote:
## Alternative: Use object storage later
Reason: Hosted scale has not been measured.
Status: obsolete

sources.title: Negative non-marker prose
sources.content:
# Discussion only

The team discussed SQLite and PostgreSQL but made no commitment.

A recommendation may be written after measurements.

约束条件仍在讨论中。
